step_rationale: Coagulation activation and thrombin generation marker; reflects ongoing thrombotic activity in coronary thrombosis.
mechanism: Thrombin-antithrombin complex is a marker of tissue-factor-triggered coagulation activation and thrombin generation, indicating active thrombus formation in acute coronary thrombosis.
